findings.title: mlflow/mlflow
findings.description: The open source AI engineering platform for agents, LLMs, and ML models. MLflow enables teams of all sizes to debug, evaluate, monitor, and optimize production-quality AI applications while controlling costs and managing access to models and data.

findings.title: langfuse/langfuse
findings.description: 🪢 Open source LLM engineering platform: LLM Observability, metrics, evals, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23

findings.title: promptfoo/promptfoo
findings.description: Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. Red teaming/pentesting/vulnerability scanning for AI. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration.  Used by OpenAI and Anthropic.

findings.title: google/adk-python
findings.description: An open-source, code-first Python toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control.

findings.title: comet-ml/opik
findings.description: Debug, evaluate, and monitor your LLM applications, RAG systems, and agentic workflows with comprehensive tracing, automated evaluations, and production-ready dashboards.

findings.title: openai/evals
findings.description: Evals is a framework for evaluating LLMs and LLM systems, and an open-source registry of benchmarks.

findings.title: raga-ai-hub/RagaAI-Catalyst
findings.description: Python SDK for Agent AI Observability, Monitoring and Evaluation Framework. Includes features like agent, llm and tools tracing, debugging multi-agentic system, self-hosted dashboard and advanced analytics with timeline and execution graph view

findings.title: confident-ai/deepeval
findings.description: The LLM Evaluation Framework

findings.title: Tencent/WeKnora
findings.description: LLM-powered framework for deep document understanding, semantic retrieval, and context-aware answers using RAG paradigm.

findings.title: vibrantlabsai/ragas
findings.description: Supercharge Your LLM Application Evaluations 🚀

findings.title: ShishirPatil/gorilla
findings.description: Gorilla: Training and Evaluating LLMs for Function Calls (Tool Calls)

findings.title: dataelement/bisheng
findings.description: BISHENG is an open LLM devops platform for next generation Enterprise AI applications. Powerful and comprehensive features include: GenAI workflow, RAG, Agent, Unified model management, Evaluation, SFT, Dataset Management, Enterprise-level System Management, Observability and more.

findings.title: tensorzero/tensorzero
findings.description: TensorZero is an open-source LLMOps platform that unifies an LLM gateway, observability, evaluation, optimization, and experimentation.

findings.title: oumi-ai/oumi
findings.description: Easily fine-tune, evaluate and deploy gpt-oss, Qwen3, DeepSeek-R1, or any open source LLM / VLM!

findings.title: evidentlyai/evidently
findings.description: Evidently is ​​an open-source ML and LLM observability framework. Evaluate, test, and monitor any AI-powered system or data pipeline. From tabular data to Gen AI. 100+ metrics.

findings.title: google/adk-go
findings.description: An open-source, code-first Go toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control.

findings.title: open-compass/opencompass
findings.description: OpenCompass is an LLM evaluation platform, supporting a wide range of models (Llama3, Mistral, InternLM2,GPT-4,LLaMa2, Qwen,GLM, Claude, etc) over 100+ datasets.

findings.title: Helicone/helicone
findings.description: 🧊 Open source LLM observability platform. One line of code to monitor, evaluate, and experiment. YC W23 🍓

findings.title: Giskard-AI/giskard-oss
findings.description: 🐢 Open-Source Evaluation & Testing library for LLM Agents

findings.title: lm-sys/RouteLLM
findings.description: A framework for serving and evaluating LLM routers - save LLM costs without compromising quality
